hero.subtitle: "Where stories come to life with a single touch..."
hero.cinematic_subtitle: Create cinematic stories using generative artificial intelligence.

usp.title: Why Skywhale.?
usp.consistency_desc: Unique Identity™ technology ensures the hero of your book looks the same from the first to the last page.
usp.speed_desc: No unnecessary waiting. From initial idea to a full illustrated book in just a moment.
usp.safety_desc: We guarantee a 100% safe environment for children. Every story passes through our ethical AI protection.
usp.first_kind_desc: We are the only platform in the world combining the generation of books, movies, and audio into one family studio.
usp.education_desc: We develop creativity and teach children to communicate with technology. Prompting is the language of the 21st century.
usp.legacy_desc: Create stories that last forever. From digital form in the cloud to the possibility of printing a physical book.

about.title: Our Story
about.text_p1: Today's children perceive the world through digital windows. Instead of bans, we chose a different path – <0>we gave this world a deeper meaning.</0>
about.text_p2: Skywhale. is not just an app, it's a creative studio that transforms passive screen time into the joy of creation. We combine cutting-edge technology with human feeling to create a safe space where small consumers become great storytellers.
about.text_p3: We put our heart into every detail because we believe that technology should serve dreams, not replace them.
about.cinematic_text_p1: Today's children perceive the world through digital windows. Instead of bans, we chose a different path – <0>we gave this world a deeper meaning.</0>
about.text_p2_cinematic: Skywhale. transforms passive screen time into the joy of creation. We combine cutting-edge technology with human feeling to create a safe space where small consumers become great storytellers. We put our heart into every detail because we believe that technology should serve dreams, not replace them.

cleanup.warning:
⚠️ WARNING: This action will delete ALL books that do not have a permanently stored cover in Supabase.

This includes:
- Empty covers
- Temporary links from Replicate (expired)
- Any external URLs

Really proceed?
cleanup.success: ✨ Clean! All books are safely stored in Supabase.
cleanup.candidates:
Found {{count}} books to purge.
(These books do NOT have a permanent image).

Delete them forever?
